title: Anathallis angustilabia
taxonomy: Anathallis angustilabia is classified in the family Orchidaceae, which is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. This family is further divided into over 700 genera, with Anathallis being a part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. The subtribe Pleurothallidinae is a group of orchids commonly known as the "pleurothallids," which are characterized by their small size and delicate flowers. Within the genus Anathallis, A. angustilabia is a species native to South America. By understanding its classification, we can better appreciate the unique characteristics and evolutionary history of this fascinating orchid species.
